/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -O3  -Wno-deprecated-declarations -Wno-unused-parameter -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_inference_cpp.dir/test/test_inference.cpp.o -o test_inference_cpp   -L/home/ardyseto/tensorrt/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -L/lib/intel64  -L/lib/intel64_win  -L/lib/win-x64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ardyseto/libtorch/lib:/home/ardyseto/tensorrt/lib:/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/lib/intel64:/lib/intel64_win:/lib/win-x64:/usr/local/lib -lnvinfer -lcudart /home/ardyseto/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so /home/ardyseto/libtorch/lib/libc10.so /home/ardyseto/libtorch/lib/libkineto.a /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libnvrtc.so /home/ardyseto/libtorch/lib/libc10_cuda.so /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/ardyseto/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/ardyseto/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cuda.so" -Wl,--as-needed /home/ardyseto/libtorch/lib/libc10_cuda.so /home/ardyseto/libtorch/lib/libc10.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/ardyseto/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed
